sourceRef.citation: Asma Khalid,Dr. Naveed Azmat, Nafeesa Rani et al. 2026

statement.en: ETHICAL CONSIDERATIONS AND POLICY FRAMEWORKS FOR TEACHING WITH ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE IN SECONDARY SCHOOL SETTINGS

proposer: Asma Khalid,Dr. Naveed Azmat, Nafeesa Rani

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a policy/framework paper addressing emergent AI-in-education practices. The axioms proposed are provisional—not yet empirically validated across diverse secondary contexts, dependent on evolving regulatory landscapes, and subject to revision as AI capabilities and educational outcomes data accumulate. The work surveys and proposes rather than proves.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 信頼と透明性のバランスが時間とともに衰退する中で、制度的な枠組みが成立する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 上の頭脳から下の根拠地への縊縄が、倫理的な土壌を求めて揺らいでいる。
